span.p:
Response whitelists
metadata: customer_email, payment_method_label
shipping_address: name, email, line1, postal, city, country
drop client_ip, stripe_session_id, phone, address_line2, etc.

span.p:
500 Internal server error
full detail logged server-side, never echoed
